content:
## Opening a New Account
1. A checking account may be opened only when the applicant meets customer_exists.
2. A savings account is available only after the customer meets personal_checking_open_for_at_least_14_days. If the customer does not yet meet that condition, explain that savings eligibility depends on the checking relationship first.
3. Do not substitute one deposit product for another when answering eligibility questions; checking and savings have separate requirements.

## Business Deposit Requests
1. business_checking eligibility requires personal_checking_open, no_closed_accounts. A customer with any closed account does not meet the listed condition for that product.
2. business_savings eligibility requires business_checking_open_for_at_least_30_days, no_negative_balances. Confirm the business checking relationship and balance condition before describing the account as available.
See "Checking Account Comparison Guide" and "Savings Account Comparison Guide" for product comparison details.

## Closing an Account
A deposit account can be closed only when every closure condition is satisfied: account_exists, account_status_is_open, after_fee_remaining_balance_is_zero. If the account exists but is not open, or if the balance would not be zero after any applicable fee, do not describe the account as closable. For employee handling steps, see "Internal: Deposit Account Closure Policy".
title: Deposit Account FAQ
